svg.metadata: Created by Integrated Control Systems, designed by .metsa - 3/14/2022 - http://www.icontrolsystems.net/
svg.desc:
help: 1> vary colors 2> vary inside diagram 3> prompt should blink 4> ad logo 5> variations a. text-size = 27em (default), 21 em; b. add all document types; 6> cirle for tab (built)
document types: Text(.txt), ReadMe(.md), [ .html .htm .xml ], .java, [ .c .cs .cpp ], .class, .dll, [ .bat .sh ,ps1 ] .svg .png .jpg .jpeg .gif .bmp .ai .psd .pdf .wav .m4a .npeg .mov .js .json .ts .css .ymal .dtd .xsl .csproj .h
